name: libgitlab-api-v4-perl
title: libgitlab-api-v4-perl
summary: GitLab API v4 module and command-line client
description:
GitLab API v4 module and command-line client
GitLab::API::v4 provides a one-to-one interface with the GitLab API v4.
Detailed information in GitLab's API can be found at
http://doc.gitlab.com/ce/api/README.html.
.
This package also includes the gitlab-api-v4 command-line interface (CLI).

commands.name: gitlab-api-v4
commands.description: Command line interface to the GitLab API v4.

arguments.description: Command line interface to the GitLab API v4.
arguments.raw: -api-v4  Command line interface to the GitLab API v4.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gitlab-api-v4 because GitLab API v4 module and command-line client.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use gitlab-api-v4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gitlab-api-v4 [<options>] <method> [<arg> ...] [<param>:<value> ...]` as documented upstream for gitlab-api-v4.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gitlab-api-v4 groups` as documented upstream for gitlab-api-v4.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gitlab-api-v4 project <project_id>` as documented upstream for gitlab-api-v4.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gitlab-api-v4 create-user \` as documented upstream for gitlab-api-v4.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gitlab-api-v4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gitlab-api-v4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -api-v4
arguments.description: Command line interface to the GitLab API v4.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install libgitlab-api-v4-perl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `gitlab-api-v4 [<options>] <method> [<arg> ...] [<param>:<value> ...]`. Further invocations from upstream: `gitlab-api-v4 project <project_id>`. GitLab API v4 module and command-line client.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: GitLab API v4 module and command-line client.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: gitlab-api-v4 - Command line interface to the GitLab API v4.
